videos.title: Rounding 4-Digit Numbers | Introduction and Overview
videos.description: Introduction to rounding 4-digit numbers: what it means and why we do it
learningObjectives: Understand why we round large numbers
Learn which place values we can round to
See examples of rounding in everyday life
Preview the rounding process
keyConceptsCovered: Purpose of rounding (estimation, simplification)
Rounding to nearest ten, hundred, thousand
Real-world contexts where rounding is used
Preview of rounding rules

videos.title: Rounding to the Nearest Ten | 4-Digit Numbers
videos.description: Learn step-by-step how to round 4-digit numbers to the nearest ten
learningObjectives: Identify the tens place and ones place
Look at the ones digit to decide rounding
Round up or down based on the rule
Practice with multiple examples
keyConceptsCovered: To round to nearest ten, look at ones digit
If ones digit is 5 or above, round up
If ones digit is below 5, round down

videos.title: Rounding to the Nearest Hundred | 4-Digit Numbers
videos.description: Master rounding 4-digit numbers to the nearest hundred with clear steps
learningObjectives: Identify the hundreds place and tens place
Look at the tens digit to decide rounding
Apply the rounding rule correctly
Handle various examples with confidence
keyConceptsCovered: To round to nearest hundred, look at tens digit
If tens digit is 5 or above, round up
If tens digit is below 5, round down

videos.title: Rounding to the Nearest Thousand | 4-Digit Numbers
videos.description: Learn to round 4-digit numbers to the nearest thousand - the largest place value
learningObjectives: Identify the thousands place and hundreds place
Look at the hundreds digit to decide rounding
Understand rounding results in multiples of 1000
Practice with different 4-digit numbers
keyConceptsCovered: To round to nearest thousand, look at hundreds digit
If hundreds digit is 5 or above, round up to next thousand
If hundreds digit is below 5, round down
followUpTopics: Choosing which place to round to

videos.title: Rounding 4-Digit Numbers | Worked Examples and Practice
videos.description: Practice rounding 4-digit numbers to different place values with detailed explanations
learningObjectives: See multiple examples of rounding to nearest ten, hundred, thousand
Practice identifying which digit to look at
Build confidence through repetition
Handle tricky cases (numbers ending in 5)
keyConceptsCovered: Mixed practice: same number rounded different ways
Example: 3,456 → 3,460 (tens), 3,500 (hundreds), 3,000 (thousands)
Common mistakes and how to avoid them
Step-by-step process for any rounding problem
prerequisites: Rounding to all three place values

videos.title: Rounding in Real Life | Word Problems and Applications
videos.description: See how rounding 4-digit numbers is used in everyday situations and solve word problems
learningObjectives: Apply rounding to real-life situations
Estimate populations, distances, prices
Solve word problems involving rounding
Understand when and why to round in context
keyConceptsCovered: Rounding populations of cities/towns
Rounding distances in kilometers
Rounding prices to nearest hundred rupees
Deciding which place value is appropriate to round to

videos.title: Rounding Challenge | Advanced Problems and Number Sense
videos.description: Challenge yourself with advanced rounding problems and develop strong number sense
learningObjectives: Solve multi-step problems involving rounding
Find numbers that round to a given value
Use rounding for mental math and estimation
Prepare for Olympiad-style questions
keyConceptsCovered: Reverse rounding: What numbers round to 5,000?
Multiple rounding: Round twice in succession
Estimation strategies using rounding
Critical thinking with rounding

excellent_performance.description: For students who scored >= 90% on readiness (strong prerequisites)
excellent_performance.rationale: Skip basic rounding review, focus on 4-digit specific content and challenges

ready_performance.description: For students who scored 80-89% on readiness (good foundation)
ready_performance.rationale: Complete coverage of all rounding concepts with applications

partial_readiness.description: For students who scored 50-79% on readiness (some gaps)
partial_readiness.rationale: Core concepts after prerequisite review, skip optional applications

after_prerequisite_review.description: For students who scored < 50% but completed prerequisite videos
after_prerequisite_review.rationale: Gentle introduction with essential rounding to ten, hundred, and practice

questions.question: Round 3,456 to the nearest ten.
questions.explanation: Look at the ones digit: 6. Since 6 is 5 or above, round up. 3,456 → 3,460.

checkpoint2.checkpointName: Rounding to Different Place Values Check

questions.question: Round 4,678 to the nearest thousand.
questions.explanation: Look at the hundreds digit: 6. Since 6 is 5 or above, round up. 4,678 → 5,000.

questions.question: Round 2,345 to the nearest hundred.
questions.explanation: Look at the tens digit: 4. Since 4 is below 5, round down. 2,345 → 2,300.

usageNotes.teacherGuidance: These videos should be assigned based on readiness assessment results. Videos 2, 3, and 4 teach the core rounding skills to different place values. Video 5 provides essential practice.
usageNotes.parentGuidance: Watch videos in sequence. Have your child practice rounding after each video. Videos 1-5 are essential for mastering rounding.
usageNotes.studentGuidance: Take notes on the rounding rule. Practice each type of rounding (nearest ten, hundred, thousand) separately before mixing them. Use the comprehension checks to test yourself.
